produce the definite integral of $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, representing the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna.  
produce the calculation of the integral $ \int_{0}^{10} (4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7) \, dx $, which results in $ \frac{10000}{4} + \frac{1000}{3} + \frac{100}{2} + 70 $.  
produce the result of the integral, which is $ 2500 + 333.33 + 50 + 70 = 2953.33 $, representing the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna.
